title: Claim Your Account
invalidToken: This invitation link is invalid or has been revoked.

roleDescriptions.observer: You'll be able to see their progress and cheer them on.
roleDescriptions.encourager: You can send messages of support to help them stay motivated.
roleDescriptions.verifier: You'll help verify their daily check-ins and hold them accountable.
